case_title: GIGI MOCANU VS. NEXT GEN CAFE OF AMERICA LLC

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOCANU, GIGI AS TO DEFENDANT NEXT GEN CAFE OF AMERICA LLC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-29-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-31-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF GIGI MOCANU IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT NEXT GEN CAFE OF AMERICA LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ARINDAM JHA. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 06/04/19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, " RETURN TO SENDER - INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
